Hey everyone, hope you're having a great day. In this video, I'm going to talk to you about meal plan distributions Here in the hybrid meal plan section. You can see that the Plans range from 1.25 to 2.75 the same thing is shown here in the six week challenge meal plans and Here in the 42 day detox meal plans we see 1x 1.5x and 2x Below this video you'll find the button to download this spreadsheet that shows the designations for each of those Plans so 1.25 corresponds to 100 to 150 pounds 1.75 corresponds to 150 to 200 pounds 2.25 corresponds to 200 to 250 pounds and 2.75 corresponds to 250 to 300 plus pounds For the calorie breakdown 1.25 corresponds to 1200 calories 1.75 corresponds to 1500 calories 2.25 corresponds to 1750 calories and 2.75 corresponds to 2100 calories Under the 42 day detox meal plans 1x corresponds to 100 to 150 pounds 1.5x corresponds to 150 to 200 pounds and 2x corresponds to 200 plus pounds. Hope you enjoyed this video
